title: M2C Consumer Request
description: Request payload sent by an M2C consumer at negotiation time (§6.2). The provider responds with the subset it can fulfill based on its Capabilities (capabilities.schema.json).

modules.description: Requested analysis modules. Must be a subset of the provider's advertised capabilities.modules.

contextLevel.description: Supply context level (optional, requires Supply module support on provider side)

maxTokens.description: Upper bound on returned context token count (hint for cost / latency budget)
